topStories.title: How Trump’s unchecked power has changed the world
topStories.description: Diplomatic norms, law and institutions have proven no hindrance to the US president. Can he really do anything he wants?

topStories.title: California Baptist punches NCAA Tournament ticket as Utah Valley suffers heartbreak
topStories.description: The California Baptist Lancers were able to take home the men's WAC Championship on Saturday with a victory over the Utah Valley Wolverines.

topStories.title: Whiskey mogul offers free $200M college campus to religious groups, with one major catch
topStories.description: A Vermont whiskey founder offers a free $200 million college campus to Christian institutions for a spiritual revival. Raj Peter Bhakta bought Green Mountain College in 2020.

dailyNews.title: UPSC’s new rule: Supreme Court nod must for delay in choosing State DGPs
dailyNews.description: Attorney General tells Supreme Court that there is no “provision empowering the UPSC to condone such inordinate delay”; States cannot appoint acting DGP as there is no such concept, says top court

dailyNews.title: Wiz investor unpacks Google’s $32B acquisition
dailyNews.description: Shardul Shah of Index Ventures walks us through Google's biggest acquisition ever.

dailyNews.title: Wild US Weather Halts Flights, Dumps Snow and Knocks Out Power
dailyNews.description: Blizzards, wildfires and thunderstorms are swirling toward the eastern US having knocked out power to thousands and grounded hundreds of flights across the Midwest.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls for naval coalition to open Strait of Hormuz: Can it work?
dailyNews.description: Analysts say US president's solution to secure the strait is fraught with problems.

dailyNews.title: Iran Fires 'Dancing Missile' For 1st Time In This War: All You Need To Know
dailyNews.description: Iran on Sunday launched a series of advanced missiles targeting Israeli and US positions, including the Sejjil missile, which has been used for the first time since the war began on February 28,...

dailyNews.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: Tucker Carlson claims CIA read his texts with Iran to frame him as foreign agent
dailyNews.description: Former Fox News host Tucker Carlson claims the CIA read his texts and recommended DOJ charges accusing him of acting as an unregistered agent for Iran. Carlson denies the allegation, calling the case politically motivated and saying speaking to foreign sources is part of his work as a commentator.

dailyNews.title: Spain v Argentina ‘Finalissima’ match in Qatar cancelled amid conflict
dailyNews.description: The fixture, part of the Qatar Football Festival, has been cancelled amid the ongoing US-Israeli war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Keisuke Honda loses US advertising deal over Iran support at World Cup
dailyNews.description: Japanese football legend says his opinion prompts US company to cancel advertising campaign before FIFA World Cup.

dailyNews.title: ICC judge says US sanctions left her without bank cards and Google accounts
dailyNews.description: An ICC judge says sanctions imposed by the Trump administration are punishing her for carrying out her judicial duties.

dailyNews.title: Latino voters are 'no longer sleeping,' Univision president warns GOP, Dems
dailyNews.description: Televisa Univision president calls Latino voters a "sleeping giant that is no longer sleeping," urging parties to revamp their approach for 2026.

dailyNews.title: Bryson DeChambeau wins LIV Golf Singapore event, surviving bunker fall and agonizing playoff
dailyNews.description: Bryson DeChambeau suffered an embarrassing fall into the sand trap on Saturday and survived a tense playoff hole on Sunday to win a LIV Golf Singapore.

dailyNews.title: Bedbug nightmare spreading across South as cases surge in multiple states
dailyNews.description: Spring break travelers face rising bedbug risks in Southern states. Reports show infestations are increasing in budget accommodations across the region.

dailyNews.title: Costco brings back churros, yet shoppers say new version is a 'slap in the face'
dailyNews.description: Costco's new $2.99 churro sundae sparks outrage among fans demanding the return of beloved full-size churros discontinued in 2024 at food courts.

dailyNews.title: Alec Baldwin’s wife turns to Instagram after $20M Hamptons home sits unsold for years
dailyNews.description: Alec and Hilaria Baldwin listed their sprawling Hamptons estate for $19.9 million after price cuts, and cited plans for a secret adventure outside of New York.

dailyNews.title: Smart glasses detector app warns if you're being recorded
dailyNews.description: New Android app detects nearby smart glasses that could be secretly recording you. Nearby Glasses scans Bluetooth to alert users of potential cameras.

dailyNews.title: Airline CEOs torch lawmakers for turning air travel into a ‘political football’
dailyNews.description: Airline leaders warned the DHS shutdown left TSA workers unpaid and travelers facing long lines as spring travel demand surged and pressure mounted on the aviation system.

dailyNews.title: WNBA star Angel Reese calls out fake quote on social media: 'Rent must be due'
dailyNews.description: Chicago Sky star Angel Reese shut down a fake quote that was falsely attributed to her on social media. She wrote on X that the "rent must be due."

dailyNews.title: Brother of Michigan synagogue attacker was Hezbollah commander, Israel alleges
dailyNews.description: Ibrahim Muhammad Ghazali, brother of the Michigan synagogue attacker, was a Hezbollah commander killed in an Israeli strike, Israeli intelligence revealed.

dailyNews.title: ‘Reminders of Him’ director says prison doesn’t define a person’s worth
dailyNews.description: Vanessa Caswill, director of the new Colleen Hoover adaptation “Reminders of Him," says the film carries a powerful message about redemption, forgiveness and second chances.

dailyNews.title: Super Bowl champion Bryce Huff retires from NFL at 27
dailyNews.description: Super Bowl champion defensive end Bryce Huff, 27, announced he was retiring from the NFL after just six seasons. He last played for the San Francisco 49ers.

dailyNews.title: 'The Madison' star Michelle Pfeiffer credits one simple beauty secret for her ageless glow at 67
dailyNews.description: Hollywood legend Michelle Pfeiffer returns to television in "The Madison," reuniting with Kurt Russell. Co-stars call working with the Hollywood icons "surreal."

topStories.description: Televisa Univision president calls Latino voters a "sleeping giant that is no longer sleeping," urging parties to revamp their approach for 2026.

topStories.title: Rising gas prices from Iran conflict put GOP on defense after previous Biden attacks
topStories.description: Gas prices have surged 50 cents per gallon amid Trump's Iran conflict, putting Republicans in the same position they previously criticized Biden for during his presidency.

topStories.title: Ben Shapiro praises Trump’s Iran strikes as ‘single bravest foreign policy move of my lifetime’
topStories.description: Ben Shapiro calls Trump's Iran strategy "the single bravest foreign policy move" of his lifetime, praising bold reassertion of American authority on the world stage.

topStories.title: For Trump, a Promised Economic Boom Collides With the Costs of War
topStories.description: President Trump said he had envisioned a growing economy and improving fortunes for American families in 2026. That appears at risk in his war with Iran.

topStories.title: FCC Chair Threatens to Revoke Broadcasters’ Licenses Over Iran War Coverage
topStories.description: The comment from Brendan Carr came on the heels of a social media message from President Trump criticizing the news media’s coverage of the war with Iran.

topStories.title: Trump Administration Turns to Migrant Workers to Help Farm Labor Shortage
topStories.description: As the president’s immigration policies squeeze an already tight supply of farm labor, the Trump administration is making it cheaper to hire foreign farmworkers.

topStories.title: FCC Chair Brendan Carr says broadcast licenses are not a "property right"
topStories.description: In an exclusive interview with CBS News Saturday, Federal Communications Chair Brendan Carr doubled down on his warning that broadcast licenses could be revoked amid President Trump's criticisms of media coverage of the war in Iran.

topStories.title: Trump says he's not ready to make a deal with Iran as Gulf countries report new attacks
topStories.description: The war, which shows no signs of ending soon, has upended global air travel, disrupted oil exports from the region and sent fuel prices rising across the world.

topStories.title: Trump economic adviser Kevin Hassett says of Iran war funding: "Right now, we've got what need"
topStories.description: White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett told "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" that so far, the war with Iran has cost $12 billion, adding that "right now, we've got what we need" on funding as lawmakers are preparing for a possible supplemental funding request from the White House.

dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with CBS News Saturday, Federal Communications Chair Brendan Carr doubled down on his warning that broadcast licenses could be revoked amid President Trump's criticisms of media coverage of the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he's not ready to make a deal with Iran as Gulf countries report new attacks
dailyNews.description: The war, which shows no signs of ending soon, has upended global air travel, disrupted oil exports from the region and sent fuel prices rising across the world.

dailyNews.title: Trump economic adviser Kevin Hassett says of Iran war funding: "Right now, we've got what need"
dailyNews.description: White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett told "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" that so far, the war with Iran has cost $12 billion, adding that "right now, we've got what we need" on funding as lawmakers are preparing for a possible supplemental funding request from the White House.

dailyNews.title: Iranian foreign minister says "we don't see any reason" to talk with U.S.
dailyNews.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said that "we don't see any reason why we should talk with Americans" as President Trump has claimed Iran is seeking a deal to end the war between the U.S. and Iran.

dailyNews.title: Open: This is "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," March 15, 2026
dailyNews.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," amid new strikes from Israel and Iran in the Middle East, Margaret Brennan speaks to Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Trump economic adviser Kevin Hassett. Plus, Rep. Dan Crenshaw and Sen. Mark Warner join.

dailyNews.title: Iranian foreign minister says "we don't see any reason why we should talk with Americans"
dailyNews.description: One day after President Trump said the U.S. is not ready to make a deal with Iran because "the terms aren't good enough yet," Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi told "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" that "we don't see any reason why we should talk with Americans."

dailyNews.title: Exclusive: Trump says Iran is ready to make a deal but ‘the terms aren’t good enough yet’
dailyNews.description: In a phone call with Meet the Press moderator Kristen Welker, President Trump says Iran had been “defeated militarily” and was ready to make a deal but “the terms aren’t good enough yet,” declining to say what those terms are. He also said Iran’s Kharg Island, home to a critical oil terminal for the country, had been “decimated,” though he could hit it again “just for fun.”

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran is ready to negotiate a ceasefire but he's not ready to make a deal
dailyNews.description: In a wide-ranging interview, President Donald Trump said he’s not ready to make a deal to end the war with Iran, despite Iran’s willingness to do so.

dailyNews.title: Adam Schiff says war with Iran is ‘simply unsustainable’: Full interview
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Sen. Adam Schiff (D-Calif.) argues there was “nothing imminent” about Iran’s threat to the U.S. and says he has yet to hear President Trump give a clear justification for the war.

dailyNews.title: Trump says there’s been ‘total obliteration’ of Iran militarily
dailyNews.description: President Trump told NBC News’ Kristen Welker in a nearly half hour phone conversation that Iran has been “militarily defeated” and he believes other countries will help to secure passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'
dailyNews.description: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'

dailyNews.title: Trump weighing options to strike Iran's critical oil hub, UN Ambassador Waltz says
dailyNews.description: Israel says it has killed two senior Iranian intelligence officials as oil loading reportedly resumes in the UAE's Fujairah port following a fire.

dailyNews.title: FCC chair slams broadcasters after Trump disputes reports on Iran-damaged U.S. tankers
dailyNews.description: FCC Chair Brendan Carr blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
